title: DME AP Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 33 Senior Resident Posts
description: Directorate of Medical Education, Andhra Pradesh (DME AP) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 33 Senior Resident Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the MD/ MS, DNB, and Post-Graduation can grab this chance and apply for the DME AP Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can attend the walk-in at ...
